name: SHIFT, Inc.
summary: SHIFT, Inc. provides software quality assurance and testing solutions in Japan. The company offers CAT, an integrated environment that supports the implementation of testing; CI (Jenkins), an outsourcing service for agile development, such as GUI automatic testing using Jenkins and Selenium Web Driver; test design solutions; non-functional testing solutions, such as load and security tests; and localization solutions. It also provides MinTest, a Website to report bugs of social games and applications. In addition, the company plans, manufactures, and sells electrical and electronics goods, software, and hardware, as well as manufactures, sells, and imports and exports related goods. SHIFT, Inc. offers its solutions in the areas of EPR/groupware, accounting, e-commerce, finance, medical/nursing, aerospace, manufacturing/retail, and real estate, as well as for smart phones and security servers. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
